    textproc/py-pygments: upgrade to 2.9.0

    Release notes at <https://github.com/pygments/pygments/releases/tag/2.9.0>.

    - Remove conflict with the defunct paraview.

    - Add a test target (3710 passed, 3 skipped).

    Exp-run by antoine.
